30 Incredible Ways to Get Galaxy Hair in 2024
30 Awesome Techniques for Achieving Galaxy Hair in 2024

перефразируй
Galaxy hair is a hair color trend that combines purple, blue, and magenta-colored hues. These celestial shades create a color melt that mimics the galaxy, hence the name ‘galaxy hair.’ These cosmo hair colors are bold, beautiful, and bright. Galaxy hairstyles are a very popular trend right now.

What is galaxy hair?

Galaxy hair is achieved by coloring your tresses with the various blue, red, pink, and purple hair colors we see in distant galaxies. As you can see from space photos, there are many shades to choose from. Even though the photos are digitally colored, they’re what we’d see with our naked eyes if close enough.

Note that these are fashion colors so they can fade quickly without the right care. Washing your hair with special color shampoo, using cold water, and washing as little as possible help.

Also, prepare yourself for a full day at the salon. It can often take 3-5 hours to get this galaxy color, so plan accordingly!

Before your next hair appointment, check out these trendy photos from the world-renowned hair colorists who’ve created incredible galaxy hair colors.

What is Galaxy Hair?

Galaxy hair is a trendy style that incorporates a mix of purple, blue, and magenta tones to create a cosmic color blend resembling the galaxy. These striking hues are vibrant and alluring, making galaxy hairstyles a sought-after trend at present.

To achieve galaxy hair, your locks are dyed with a variety of colors like blue, red, pink, and purple inspired by the colors seen in remote galaxies. While space photos serve as a reference, it's important to note that these are artistic interpretations, reflecting what we might observe in space with our own eyes.

It's essential to maintain galaxy hair properly as these fashion colors can fade quickly. To preserve the color, opt for color-safe shampoos, use cold water while washing, and minimize washing frequency.

Keep in mind that getting galaxy hair can be a time-consuming process, often requiring 3-5 hours in the salon. So, make sure to allocate enough time for your appointment!

Before your next hairstyling session, take inspiration from stunning galaxy hair creations by renowned colorists to explore different trends and possibilities.

Colorful Butterfly Cut
Butterfly Cut with Bright Colors

перефразируй
A butterfly cut is a 70’s hairstyle with a modern punch of vivid colors placed throughout. Using 3-4 colors in the same color family or tonal range might be helpful. Your hair colorist should mention that such galaxy hair styles will be highly maintained. Expect to lighten your roots every 6-8 weeks. Vivid colors, being semi-permanent, do fade a bit quicker than permanent hair color. Make sure only to shampoo your hair 1-2x per week to prevent your hair color from fading too quickly.

The Butterfly Cut is a retro hairstyle from the 1970s that has been updated with vibrant, modern colors. Incorporating 3-4 shades within the same color family or tonal range is recommended for this style. It's essential to note that maintaining such galaxy hairstyles requires regular upkeep, with root touch-ups needed every 6-8 weeks. Since vivid colors are semi-permanent, they may fade faster than permanent hair dyes. To prolong the vibrancy of your hair color, limit shampooing to 1-2 times per week.

Chunky highlights with a galaxy-inspired twist are a playful and timeless color trend. The vibrant highlights juxtaposed next to each other offer a striking contrast, adding a distinctive dimension to the hair. To amplify this style, apply a shine spray to achieve a glossy finish.

Straight Hair with Vibrant Galaxy Colors

перефразируй
Vivid galaxy straight hair is a fun option all year round. Avoid using hot water on your hair to keep the vivid colors of the hair bright. Always ask your stylist for product recommendations because they know what is best for maintaining the beauty of your locks.

Opting for vivid galaxy straight hair is a playful choice that works well throughout the year. To preserve the brightness of the vibrant colors, it's advisable to avoid using hot water on your hair. Consulting your stylist for product recommendations is essential, as they are knowledgeable about the most suitable products to maintain the beauty of your locks.

Futuristic Galaxy Waves
Modern Galaxy Waves

перефразируй
Futuristic galaxy waves are fun and vibrant and best for women who want a little vibrancy, dimension, and texture in their hair. One of the best ways to add dimension and depth to your hair is by coloring your hair in multiple shades. Dyeing your hair a darker color on top and a lighter/different color on the bottom will create a beautiful 2-toned color melt and give you the depth and dimension you’re searching for. Styling your hair with messy waves will add the messy texture you want.

Contemporary galaxy waves are exciting and lively, ideal for women seeking vibrancy, dimension, and texture in their hair. Incorporating multiple shades through coloring is one of the most effective methods to enhance depth and dimension in your hair. Opting for a darker hue on the top and a lighter or contrasting color on the bottom can result in a stunning two-toned color blend, providing the desired depth and dimension. Styling your hair with tousled waves will introduce the desired messy texture.

To create hidden galaxy-hued highlights, the hair is bleached and dyed with shades of blue, pink, and purple to achieve a vibrant color palette. To achieve a peek-a-boo effect, request that your stylist place these highlights on the mid to lower section of your hair.
